address: 10/18 Sri Thammasok Road 3, Nakhon Si Thammarat, Thailand
opening_hours: Daytime visits; recheck current demonstration or workshop timing before going

description.en: The city's strongest shadow-puppet craft and performance stop.
description.nl: De sterkste schaduwpoppen- en performance-stop van de stad.

metaTitle.en: Ban Nang Talung Suchart Subsin | Go2Thailand
metaTitle.nl: Ban Nang Talung Suchart Subsin | Go2Thailand

metaDescription.en: Why Ban Nang Talung Suchart Subsin is one of the most important cultural stops in Nakhon Si Thammarat beyond the temple core.
metaDescription.nl: Waarom Ban Nang Talung Suchart Subsin een van de belangrijkste culturele stops van Nakhon Si Thammarat is naast de tempelkern.

enhanced_description:
Ban Nang Talung Suchart Subsin is one of the clearest reasons not to reduce Nakhon Si Thammarat to a temple-only stop. The city has a stronger cultural identity than that, and nang talung is a major part of it. This house-and-learning-center format matters because it keeps the craft, performance, and family continuity visible in a way that a standard museum display often cannot.

It is best used after the temple district, not instead of it. Once you have seen Wat Phra Mahathat, Ban Nang Talung gives the trip a second pillar: lived cultural production. That is what turns Nakhon from a single-site heritage city into a place with a broader artistic story and stronger local specificity.
detailed_history: Tourism Authority of Thailand material still highlights Suchart Subsin's role in the nang talung tradition and presents the site as an exhibition, workshop, and performance space. That combination is exactly why it remains one of the most valuable culture stops in the city.
visitor_experience: Expect a learning-center feel rather than a monumental attraction. The site is most rewarding when you are interested in process, craft continuity, and cultural performance rather than only ticking off another sightseeing name.

best_time_to_visit.crowd_level: Usually calmer than the temple district

practical_info.how_to_get_there: Reached by short city ride from the old-town and temple side.
practical_info.nearby_attractions: Wat Phra Mahathat district, Ban Tan Khun, Nakhon Si Thammarat National Museum, and nearby craft-shopping lanes.
practical_info.food_options: Pair it with a city breakfast or a lunch stop rather than treating it as a standalone half-day.
practical_info.shopping: Nang talung souvenirs and craft-related purchases may be available depending on the current setup.

insider_tips: Recheck current demonstration times before building a tight schedule around the visit.
This stop works best when you are interested in craft and performance, not only big landmarks.
Pair it with the temple and museum layer for a stronger city day.
verified_note: Source-backed summary based on Tourism Authority of Thailand attraction and culture coverage. Current demonstration details should be confirmed locally.
cultural_significance: Ban Nang Talung helps explain why Nakhon Si Thammarat still matters as a southern Thai arts center and not only as a temple city.

contentSources.name: 4 Cultural Places You Can't Miss in Nakhon Si Thammarat
